morning.title: EU General Court dismisses Apple's legal challenges against its designation as a DMA "gatekeeper"
morning.summary: The EU General Court has dismissed Apple's legal challenges against its designation as a DMA "gatekeeper" for its App Store and iOS.

morning.title: Chip startup SambaNova raised a $1B Series F led by General Atlantic at an $11B valuation
morning.summary: SambaNova has raised $1 billion in a Series F funding round led by General Atlantic, valuing the company at $11 billion.

morning.title: US lawmakers are considering strategies to curb US companies' growing adoption of Chinese AI models
morning.summary: US lawmakers are considering strategies to curb US companies' growing adoption of Chinese AI models due to security concerns.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM has acquired Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
morning.summary: ZML has released a free product to speed up inference across multiple AI chips, aiming to improve AI performance.

morning.title: The real cost, security, and culture problems behind enterprise AI agents
morning.summary: Enterprise AI agents can bring significant costs, security risks, and cultural challenges that need to be addressed.

morning.title: Anthropic brings Claude Cowork to mobile and web as usage data shows most users aren’t coding
morning.summary: Anthropic has expanded Claude Cowork to mobile and web, catering to non-coding users based on usage data insights.

morning.title: I spent a week with Sony's $3,500 Bravia TV - the True RGB display is the real deal
morning.summary: A review of Sony's $3,500 Bravia TV highlights the exceptional quality of its True RGB display.

morning.title: Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models
morning.summary: Microsoft is shifting towards using its own AI models to cut costs, following a trend in the tech industry.

morning.title: Hackers can use 9 of the most popular AI tools to assemble massive botnets
morning.summary: Researchers have found that hackers can exploit popular AI tools to create massive botnets, posing significant security risks.

gym.title: On Making Organizational Culture Great

gym.summary: This video tutorial shows how to create a WhatsApp chatbot for business without requiring any coding knowledge.
